votes.rationale: The repo already has working packet, inbox, and runtime event foundations. This motion formalizes them into a shared contract and control-plane view without changing Prisma enum semantics, which is the safest next step toward real multi-agent workflows.

Scope is bounded to shared contract helpers and operator work surfaces. The change is additive, keeps approval boundaries intact, and improves architectural soundness by making run ledger and handoff history explicit.
Unanimous consent satisfied. This motion turns the existing Work Packet system into a more durable governed execution contract and is an appropriate bridge before broader JAI Agent operability.
